---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What's missing? What currently takes extra steps or feels wrong?

## The proposal

What would solve it. Be concrete — "add X so Y" beats "make it better".

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Scope check

Organizator files are meant to stay small and focused. Does this feature keep the project-root footprint minimal? Would it bloat the organizator past the line limits in `SKILL.md`?

- [ ] Yes, this keeps the organizator lean
- [ ] I'm not sure — happy to discuss
- [ ] No, but the tradeoff is worth it because...

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to related discussions.
